name: normalization-workflow
description: Machine-readable normalization workflow definition — HTML normalization, CSS normalization, media normalization, and structured data normalization.

url.description: Source URL for relative URL resolution

structuredData.description: JSON-LD and microdata from the page

steps.name: Strip Unwanted Elements
steps.description: Remove scripts, styles, comments, and non-semantic elements from HTML

steps.name: Decode HTML Entities
steps.description: Decode HTML entities — & to &,   to space, &#xxx; to characters

steps.name: Normalize Whitespace
steps.description: Normalize whitespace — multiple spaces to single space, trim leading/trailing, normalize line breaks

steps.name: Extract and Normalize CSS
steps.description: Extract inline styles and external stylesheets, normalize CSS properties and values

steps.name: Extract and Normalize Media
steps.description: Extract images, videos, downloads; deduplicate by URL and hash; validate URLs; categorize by type

steps.name: Normalize URLs
steps.description: Resolve relative URLs to absolute; normalize protocol; remove trailing slashes; deduplicate

steps.name: Normalize Structured Data
steps.description: Normalize JSON-LD, microdata — extract product data, organization, breadcrumbs, FAQ, schema

steps.name: Return Normalization Result
steps.description: Bundle all normalization results into a single output object
